bin:vitte|unknown|en|E1029.help: Keep local declaration names unique within one module.

bin:vitte|unknown|en|E0002.help: Provide a value, call, or block expression (e.g., 1, name, call(), { ... }).

bin:vitte|unknown|en|E0009.help: Add a body with { ... } or mark it #[extern] if it is provided by the runtime.
bin:vitte|unknown|en|E0009.example: proc add(a: int, b: int) -> int { return a + b }

bin:vitte|unknown|en|E0007.help: Top-level items include space, use, form, pick, type, const, proc, and entry.
bin:vitte|unknown|en|E0007.example:
space my/app
proc main() -> int { return 0 }
